case_title: VINCENT J UNGARO JR VS. DAVID SEYBOLT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF VINCENT J. UNGARO, JR. AND DEFENDANT DAVID SEYBOLT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBIT NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
